title: Choke Selection for Small Game
description: How should I choose a shotgun choke for small game hunting in brush?
narrative: The user is a hunter looking for guidance on selecting the most suitable choke type for small game in dense brush where a tighter pattern is beneficial but safe for the chosen load and gauge. Relevance should include explanations of choke types (cylinder, improved cylinder, modified, etc.), how pellet pattern diameter varies with choke and gauge, safety restrictions for slugs and sabots, and practical advice on patterning and selecting a choke tube for specific ammunition and hunting conditions.

title: Histogram vs Pareto
description: What are the key differences between a histogram and a Pareto chart when visualizing quality data?
narrative: The user is reviewing quality data and needs to decide which chart type best represents the underlying distribution versus the relative importance of defects. Relevance requires that an answer clearly defines both histogram and Pareto chart, explains their visual structure (frequency distribution vs decreasing frequency order), discusses typical use cases (distribution shape analysis versus prioritizing corrective actions), notes key distinctions (bar height meaning, ordering, cumulative percentages), and offers practical guidance or examples. Papers that merely list chart types without comparing them or that conflated the two are not relevant.

title: Dye Removal Methods
